sessions.title: Post to Discord when a new RSS item matches a…

messages.text: Post to Discord when a new RSS item matches a keyword
To create a workflow that posts to Discord when a new RSS item matches a keyword, we need to clarify a few details. We will use the RSS feed as the trigger and Discord as the action.

questions: What is the URL of the RSS feed you want to monitor?
What keyword do you want to match in the RSS items?
Which Discord channel do you want to post the matching items to?
suggestedTemplates: Monitor RSS feed for specific keywords and send email notifications
Post new RSS items to a Slack channel
Trigger a webhook when an RSS item matches a certain condition

messages.text: Post new RSS items to a Slack channel

To post new RSS items to a Slack channel, we need to define the specifics of the workflow. The RSS feed will serve as the trigger, and Slack will be the action. We'll need to determine the details of the RSS feed and the Slack channel.

questions: What is the URL of the RSS feed you want to monitor?
What is the name of the Slack channel where you want to post new RSS items?
suggestedTemplates: Post new GitHub issues to a Slack channel
Send new Reddit posts to a Discord server
Forward new email notifications to a Slack channel

messages.text: Post new GitHub issues to a Slack channel

To post new GitHub issues to a Slack channel, we'll need to define the specifics of the workflow. The GitHub issues will serve as the trigger, and Slack will be the action. We'll need to determine the details of the GitHub repository and the Slack channel. 
   Please consider the following:
   * Which GitHub repository should we monitor for new issues?
   * What type of issues should we post to Slack (e.g. all issues, issues with specific labels)?
   * Which Slack channel should we post the issues to?
   * What information about the issue should we include in the Slack post (e.g. title, description, assignee)?

questions: Which GitHub repository should we monitor for new issues?
What type of issues should we post to Slack?
suggestedTemplates: Post new GitHub issues with specific labels to a Slack channel
Post all new GitHub issues to a Slack channel
Post new GitHub issues assigned to a specific user to a Slack channel

sessions.title: Trigger a webhook when a Stripe payment fails

messages.text: Trigger a webhook when a Stripe payment fails

To create a workflow that triggers a webhook when a Stripe payment fails, we need more details. Please consider the following: 
   * What specific event in Stripe should trigger the webhook? Is it when a payment fails, or when a subscription is canceled due to a failed payment?
   * What information should be sent in the webhook? Should it include customer details, payment amount, or failure reason?
   * Are there any specific conditions or filters that should be applied before triggering the webhook, such as only for certain products or customers?

questions: What is the exact Stripe event that should trigger the webhook?
What details should be included in the webhook request?
suggestedTemplates: Stripe Payment Failure Notification
Stripe Subscription Cancellation Webhook
Stripe Payment Event Webhook

messages.text: Stripe Payment Failure Notification

To set up a workflow for sending a notification when a Stripe payment fails, we'll need to clarify a few details. 
   * The trigger will be based on the Stripe service and the event of a payment failure.
   * The action will involve sending a notification, possibly via email or a messaging platform.
   Please consider the following:
   - What service should be used for sending the notification (e.g., Gmail, Slack, Telegram)?
   - What details about the failed payment should be included in the notification (e.g., customer name, payment amount, failure reason)?
   - Are there any specific conditions under which the notification should or should not be sent?

questions: What service should be used for sending the notification (e.g., Gmail, Slack, Telegram)?
What details about the failed payment should be included in the notification?
suggestedTemplates: Stripe Payment Failure to Slack Notification
Stripe Payment Failure to Email Notification
Stripe Payment Failure to Custom Webhook

messages.text: Stripe Payment Failure to Custom Webhook

To create a workflow that sends a notification to a custom webhook when a Stripe payment fails, we need to finalize a few details. 
   The trigger will be based on the Stripe service and the event of a payment failure. 
   The action will involve sending a request to a custom webhook.

questions: What specific details about the failed payment should be sent in the webhook request (e.g., payment amount, customer ID, failure reason)?
What is the URL of the custom webhook that should receive the notification?
suggestedTemplates: Stripe Payment Failure to Slack Notification
Stripe Payment Failure to Email Notification
Stripe Payment Failure to Custom API Endpoint

messages.text: Stripe Payment Failure to Slack Notification

To send a notification to Slack when a Stripe payment fails, we need to confirm a few details. 
   The trigger will be based on the Stripe service and the event of a payment failure. 
   The action will involve sending a message to a Slack channel. 
   Please consider the following:
   * Which Slack channel should receive the notification?
   * What details about the failed payment should be included in the notification (e.g., customer name, payment amount, failure reason)?

questions: Which Slack channel should receive the notification?
What details about the failed payment should be included in the notification?
suggestedTemplates: Stripe Payment Failure to Email Notification
Stripe Payment Success to Slack Notification

sessions.title: Send me an email every morning at 9am with a …

messages.text: Send me an email every morning at 9am with a motivational quote
To create a workflow that sends you a motivational quote every morning, let's clarify a few details. We'll need to decide on the source of the quotes and the email service to use.

questions: What email service would you like to use (e.g. Gmail, Outlook)?
Where would you like to source the motivational quotes from (e.g. a specific API, a database, or a file)?
suggestedTemplates: Daily Weather Update Email
Morning News Summary

messages.text: Morning News Summary

To create a workflow that sends a morning news summary, we need to determine a few specifics. 
   ### Trigger Details
   The trigger for this workflow could be a scheduled event, such as a daily cron job at 9am. 
   ### Action Details
   For the action, we'll need to decide on the news source and the email service to use. 
   Some options for news sources include:
   * RSS feeds from news websites
   * News APIs
   * Web scraping
   For the email service, options include:
   * Gmail
   * Outlook
   * Custom SMTP server

questions: What news source would you like to use for the summary?
Which email service would you like to use to send the summary?
suggestedTemplates: Daily News Digest from RSS Feeds
Custom News Summary using News API
Morning Brief with Web Scraping

messages.text: Morning Brief with Web Scraping

To create a workflow that sends a morning brief with web scraping, let's refine the details. 
   We'll need to decide on the website to scrape for news and the email service to use. 
   Some popular news websites include:
   * BBC News
   * CNN
   * The New York Times
   For the email service, options include:
   * Gmail
   * Outlook
   * Custom SMTP server

questions: Which news website would you like to scrape for the morning brief?
Which email service would you like to use to send the morning brief?
suggestedTemplates: Daily News Summary from BBC News
Morning Brief with Top Headlines from CNN
Custom News Summary from The New York Times

sessions.title: Send me an email every morning at 9am with a …

messages.text: Send me an email every morning at 9am with a motivational quote using gmail

To create a workflow that sends you a motivational quote every morning at 9am using Gmail, let's break down the details. We'll need to clarify a few points to ensure the workflow meets your expectations.

questions: What is the recipient's email address for the motivational quote?
Would you like the motivational quotes to be randomly selected from a predefined list or fetched from an external API?
suggestedTemplates: Daily Weather Update Email
Scheduled Task Reminder
Inspirational Quote of the Day

messages.text: Inspirational Quote of the Day

To send an inspirational quote of the day via Gmail every morning at 9am, we need to clarify a few details. 
   * Where will the inspirational quotes come from? 
   * Do you have a specific Gmail account you'd like to use for sending these emails? 
   * Who should the emails be addressed to?

questions: What is the source of the inspirational quotes?
Which Gmail account should be used to send the emails?
suggestedTemplates: Daily Motivational Email
Inspirational Quote Notification
Morning Routine Automation

messages.text: Daily Motivational Email, sydystic.dev@gmail.com, sydystic.dev@gmail.com

To confirm, you want to send a daily motivational email to `sydystic.dev@gmail.com` from the same Gmail account `sydystic.dev@gmail.com` every morning at 9am. We still need to determine where the motivational quotes will come from. Here are a few options:
   * Use a public API that provides daily inspirational quotes
   * Select quotes from a specific book or website
   * Manually input a list of quotes to cycle through

questions: Where would you like to source the daily motivational quotes from?
Would you like to include any specific formatting or content in the email body?
suggestedTemplates: Daily Weather Update Email
Quote of the Day from Public API
Customizable Daily Reminder

messages.text: Quote of the Day from Public API

We will use a public API to fetch the Quote of the Day. To proceed, let's finalize the details. 
   * The workflow will be triggered by a daily schedule at 9am.
   * It will fetch a quote from a public API.
   * The quote will be sent via Gmail to `sydystic.dev@gmail.com` from `sydystic.dev@gmail.com`.
   Please confirm if you want to include the quote's author in the email and if there's a specific subject line you'd like to use for these daily emails.

action.details: Quote of the Day from Public API

questions: Do you want to include the quote's author in the email?
Is there a specific subject line you'd like to use for these daily emails?
suggestedTemplates: Daily Weather Update
News Digest

messages.text: News Digest

To create a News Digest workflow, we need to clarify a few details. 
   * What type of news are you interested in (e.g. general, sports, technology)?
   * How often would you like to receive the digest (e.g. daily, weekly)?
   * Would you like to include summaries or just headlines?
   * Should the digest be sent via email or another channel?

questions: What type of news are you interested in?
How often would you like to receive the digest?
suggestedTemplates: Daily News Summary
Weekly News Roundup
Custom News Feed

messages.text: general, daily, headlines, email

To create a daily general news digest sent via email with headlines, we'll need to determine the source of the news. Some options include:
   * Using a news API (e.g. NewsAPI, Google News)
   * Scraping news from a specific website
   * Using an RSS feed from a news outlet
   Please confirm which option you prefer or if you have another source in mind.

questions: Which news source would you like to use for the digest?
suggestedTemplates: Daily News Summary from NewsAPI
Headline Digest from Google News
Custom News Feed from RSS

messages.text: Headline Digest from Google News

To create a daily general news digest sent via email with headlines from Google News, we'll need to finalize a few details. 
   * We will use Google News as the source for the headlines.
   * The digest will be sent daily via email to `sydystic.dev@gmail.com` from `sydystic.dev@gmail.com`.
   * We will include a list of headlines in the email.
   Please confirm if you want to include a brief summary for each headline and if there's a specific subject line you'd like to use for these daily emails.

questions: Do you want to include a brief summary for each headline?
Is there a specific subject line you'd like to use for these daily emails?
suggestedTemplates: Daily News Digest with Summaries
Headline-Only News Digest

messages.text: Daily News Digest with Summaries

To confirm, you want to send a daily news digest with summaries via email to `sydystic.dev@gmail.com` from `sydystic.dev@gmail.com`. The digest will include headlines and summaries from Google News. 
   Please confirm if you want to limit the number of articles included in the digest and if there's a specific subject line you'd like to use for these daily emails.

action.details: Daily News Digest with summaries from Google News

questions: Do you want to limit the number of articles in the digest?
Is there a specific subject line you'd like to use for these daily emails?
suggestedTemplates: Daily News Digest with Summaries from Google News
Weekly News Roundup with Top Stories
Customizable News Feed with Filtering Options

messages.text: Daily News Digest with Summaries from Google News

To confirm, you want to send a daily news digest with summaries via email to `sydystic.dev@gmail.com` from `sydystic.dev@gmail.com`. The digest will include headlines and summaries from Google News. 
   We will use a daily schedule at 9am to trigger the workflow. 
   The workflow will fetch the top general news headlines and summaries from Google News. 
   The email will include a list of headlines with brief summaries.

action.details: Daily News Digest with Summaries from Google News

questions: Do you want to limit the number of articles included in the digest?
Is there a specific subject line you'd like to use for these daily emails?
suggestedTemplates: Daily News Digest with Headlines
Weekly News Summary
Breaking News Alerts

messages.text: okay

We have finalized the details for the Daily News Digest with Summaries from Google News. The workflow will be triggered daily at 9am and will send an email to `sydystic.dev@gmail.com` from `sydystic.dev@gmail.com` with headlines and summaries from Google News.

action.details: Daily News Digest with Summaries from Google News
